nasb.text: May the Lord direct your hearts into the love of God and into the steadfastness of Christ.

esv.text: May the Lord direct your hearts to the love of God and to the steadfastness of Christ.

cnv.text: 願主引導你們的心，使你們有　神的愛和基督的堅忍。

ccb.text: 愿主引导你们的心领悟上帝的爱和基督的坚忍。

csbs.text: 愿主引导你们的心归于神的慈爱，又归于基督的忍耐。
